nodes.context: Chinese American street gang prominent in New York City's Chinatown from early 1970s to mid 1990s.
Chinese tong affiliated with Ghost Shadows.
Older Chinatown gang affiliated with Hip Sing Tong, rival of Ghost Shadows.
Chinatown gang affiliated with Tung On Association, rival of Ghost Shadows.
Ally of Ghost Shadows per infobox.
Ally of Ghost Shadows per infobox.
Italian-American organized crime families with links to Ghost Shadows.

edges.evidence_quote: the gang was affiliated with the On Leong Tong
edges.context: Ghost Shadows was affiliated with On Leong Tong.

edges.evidence_quote: the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Chinatown gangs such as the older Flying Dragons
edges.context: Ghost Shadows fought turf wars with Flying Dragons.

edges.evidence_quote: the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Chinatown gangs such as the older Flying Dragons, affiliated with Hip Sing Tong and the Division Street Boys affiliated with Tung On Association.
edges.context: Ghost Shadows fought turf wars with Division Street Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: On Leong Tong , Big Circle Gang , Tiny Rascal Gang
edges.context: Big Circle Gang is listed as an ally of Ghost Shadows in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: On Leong Tong , Big Circle Gang , Tiny Rascal Gang
edges.context: Tiny Rascal Gang is listed as an ally of Ghost Shadows in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Ghost Shadows' influence was widespread, having links to Chinatowns in other cities, as well as links to Sicilian-American Mafia families.
edges.context: Ghost Shadows had links to Sicilian-American Mafia families.
